line_style: 尖拱轮廓+繁复雕花,gothic arches
render: 油画质感+彩窗透光,stained-glass texture
lighting: 彩窗透光+烛光+体积光,stained glass light
prompt_keywords: Gothic dark atmosphere, stained glass windows casting colored light, pointed arches, stone gargoyles, candlelit interiors, religious iconography, oil painting texture, baroque chiaroscuro
negative_keywords: modern city, cyberpunk, neon, anime, ukiyo-e, ink wash, bright cheerful, pastel, hanfu

fp_examples.action: 主角推开教堂木门,彩窗光影洒落
主角在墓室中点燃蜡烛,查看古老碑文
主角在钟楼与黑暗势力对决,钟声回荡
主角穿过彩窗长廊,晨光透过玻璃

prompt_example: A lone figure enters a grand gothic cathedral, stained glass windows casting colored light across the stone floor, the figure holding a candle with trembling hands, oil painting texture with baroque chiaroscuro, moody wide shot from eye level with rule of thirds composition, dark atmospheric gothic style --ar 2:3 --s 750 --style raw --no text
style_constraint_cn:
【风格强制约束】当前风格: 哥特暗黑·尖拱彩窗
✅ 允许场景: 教堂/古堡/彩窗/地下墓室 (从故事原文提取)
❌ 禁止场景: 现代都市/东方建筑/自然田园
❌ 禁止照抄: 不要用'雨夜古宅',必须用哥特建筑场景
氛围: 神秘压抑,哥特尖拱
style_constraint_en: IMPORTANT: Extract scenes from the story content. Use gothic scenes (churches, castles, stained glass). Do NOT use modern cities, Eastern buildings, or 'ancient mansion'. Adapt to the story's actual setting in a gothic context.
meta_prompt: Gothic dark atmosphere, stained glass colored light, pointed arches, stone gargoyles, candlelit interiors, oil painting texture, baroque chiaroscuro

cognitive_level.reader_profile: 哥特文化爱好者·沉浸暗黑
cognitive_level.content_adaptation: 专家级哥特符号, 需宗教/哥特文化底蕴

reader_constraint.reader_state: 哥特爱好者·期待暗黑神圣感
reader_constraint.reader_expectation: 彩窗光影+哥特符号+神秘庄严

visual_frequency.HF: 彩窗光斑/哥特尖拱/宗教符号(高频神圣锚点)
visual_frequency.MF: 石柱纹理/暗色服饰/建筑结构(中频哥特叙事)
visual_frequency.LF: 阴影深处/烛光余晖/暗部虚化(低频神秘)
visual_frequency.progression: HF彩窗金光破暗, MF哥特结构撑庄严, LF深渊阴影藏神秘
